prompt: My Salesforce SAML login works in the demo but users aren't being provisioned when I assign them in Okta. I'm using the Salesforce OIN app on my deel-oig-poc tenant. How do I fix this?

assertions.name: checks-api-integration-enabled
assertions.check: Output mentions checking that API Integration is enabled in Okta provisioning settings

assertions.name: checks-oauth-auth
assertions.check: Output mentions re-authenticating or checking the OAuth credentials / API integration connection

assertions.name: checks-federation-identifier
assertions.check: Output mentions FederationIdentifier attribute mapping as a potential cause

assertions.name: checks-provisioning-tasks-log
assertions.check: Output mentions checking the Okta Provisioning Tasks or error log to see failure details

assertions.name: checks-salesforce-profile
assertions.check: Output mentions verifying the Salesforce Profile is set correctly in the user's app assignment
